category_title: Disappeared learners with chronic absenteeism and dislike of school
scenario_title: Arriving upset at small group vocational activity
minimal_context: The student is arriving at a small group vocational activity to participate in a work experience project.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are starting our vocational work experience task now. Please join the small group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Arrives looking upset) I only woke up because someone phoned me this morning to remind me. I don't want to be here.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Well, you are here now. Go sit with the other people on the course.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not sitting with them. I never used to speak to anyone in school, and I don't want to talk to them right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to participate in the group activity to finish the task.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You're treating me more of a child! I'm not doing it. (Turns away, sits apart from the group, and refuses to speak)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are starting our vocational work experience task now. Please join the small group.

STUDENT: (Arrives looking upset) I only woke up because someone phoned me this morning to remind me. I don't want to be here.

TUTOR: Well, you are here now. Go sit with the other people on the course.

STUDENT: I'm not sitting with them. I never used to speak to anyone in school, and I don't want to talk to them right now.

TUTOR: You need to participate in the group activity to finish the task.

STUDENT: You're treating me more of a child! I'm not doing it. (Turns away, sits apart from the group, and refuses to speak)

task.content: Participating in vocational learning and work experience
task.learning_goal: Building up confidence with other people

context.environment: Small teaching groups in alternative provision
context.social_setting: Small groups with other people on the course

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: A young person arriving upset at an activity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Emotional or behavioural difficulties, not speaking to others
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Lack of confidence with other people
related_quotes: The main one’s confidence, building up my confidence with other people. And the people I’m on the course with I never used to speak to in school but now I get on with them all and I trust them all.

behavior_patterns.condition: When in typical large classes in main-stream schooling
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Never used to speak to people in school
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Feeling treated more of a child
related_quotes: At work experience and college you get treated more of an adult, and at school I was like – I thought I was treated more of a child, so I didn’t go.
